versions.mermaid:
%% VisuDEV architecture overview (bootstrap, needs-review)
flowchart TB
  subgraph ui [Frontend Vite React]
    Shell[Shell]
    Projects[Projects]
    AppFlow[App Flow]
    Blueprint[Blueprint Views]
    Data[Data ERD]
    Settings[Settings]
  end

  subgraph analysis [Analysis]
    LocalEngine[Local Engine]
    Graph[Software Graph]
    AC[Access Control Analyzers]
    Enrich[Blueprint Enrichment]
  end

  subgraph runtime [Runtime]
    Preview[Preview Runner]
    Supabase[Supabase Edge + Auth]
  end

  Shell --> Projects
  Shell --> AppFlow
  Shell --> Blueprint
  Shell --> Data
  Shell --> Settings
  Projects --> LocalEngine
  Projects --> Supabase
  LocalEngine --> Graph
  Graph --> Enrich
  Graph --> AC
  Enrich --> Blueprint
  AC --> Blueprint
  AppFlow --> Preview

flowchart TB
  subgraph ui [Frontend]
    Diag[Diagnostics / AC Matrix]
  end
  subgraph analysis [Analysis]
    Graph[Software Graph]
    Chain[App Chain Analyzer]
    Adapters[DB Security Adapters]
    Findings[AccessControlFindings]
  end
  Graph --> Chain
  Graph --> Adapters
  Chain --> Findings
  Adapters --> Findings
  Findings --> Diag
